data.name: My sexy Neighbour 2
data.detailed_description:
在My Sexy Neighbor 2中，你是火辣線上論壇的一員，粉絲會拼命打賞，只為讓你完成他們最變態的要求——從偷走鄰居最喜歡的內褲，到闖入他人家中並拍下現場畫面。

任務越危險，打賞越豐厚。隨著情況升溫，挑戰也變得愈發瘋狂。



自由探索看似安靜的郊區社區，提升技能、購買裝置，把你不起眼的部落格打造成真正的 NSFW 帝國。最重要的是——千萬別被抓到……否則遊戲直接結束。

🧩主要特色

🌆 可自由探索、逼真細膩的社區
穿梭後院、研究鄰居的日常作息並設計創意路線。每一扇門後都藏著新的機會。

📹 即時部落格與打賞系統
粉絲想要內容——而且他們願意付錢。完成請求、直播任務並累積你作為混亂之王的聲望。

🕵️‍♂️ 帶點刺激的潛行玩法
使用裝置、躲藏在陰影中，或直接冒險。你的獎勵？從現場拍攝的露骨、無遮掩成人場景。

💸 透過行動成長
把收入用在技能、新工具或下一次瘋狂挑戰的準備上。更多金錢 = 更多瘋狂。

🔞 無審查、純 18+ 內容
沒有遮掩、沒有弱化。這是一款具有強烈偷窺風格的完整成人模擬體驗——專為敢突破界線的玩家打造。

data.short_description: 經營火辣部落格、接受粉絲的瘋狂挑戰，在社區四處搜尋，打造全網最狂野的內容。從調皮惡作劇到完整成人任務——一切都是為了金錢、混亂與性張力。記住唯一的規則：別被抓到。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: My sexy Neighbour 2
data.detailed_description:
In My Sexy Neighbor 2, you're the member of a spicy online forum where your fans throw cash at you to do whatever twisted stuff they can dream up — from stealing a neighbor's favorite panties to breaking into homes and recording the aftermath.

The bigger the dare, the fatter the donation. And the higher the heat, the crazier the challenges get.

Roam freely through a quiet-looking suburban neighborhood, upgrade your skills, buy gadgets, and turn your humble online blog into the ultimate NSFW empire. Just don’t get caught… or it’s game over.

🧩KEY FEATURES

🌆 Fully explorable, realistic neighborhood

Sneak through yards, figure out your neighbors’ routines, and get creative with your routes. Every door hides an opportunity.

📹 Real-time blogging & donation system

Your fans want content — and they’re paying for it. Take on requests, stream your missions, and build up your rep as the king of chaos.

🕵️‍♂️ Stealth meets kink

Use gadgets, hide in shadows, and play smart — or go bold and risky. Your reward? Raw, uncensored adult scenes, straight from the action.

💸 Level up through hustle

Spend your earnings on skills, new tools, or just go all out on prepping for the next big challenge. More money = more madness.

🔞 Unfiltered 18+ content

Nothing is blurred, nothing is held back. This is full-on voyeur, adult-sim territory — for players who dare to push boundaries.

data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
